samples.xml_description:
<module id="right_shifter">
    <description>Right shifter module that shifts the input data to the right by one bit.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="d">Input signal to be shifted.</input>
        <output id="q">Output signal representing the shifted data.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Initialize q to 0. Right shift q by 1 bit and insert d into the MSB.</implementation>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="q" width_description="[7:0]">Register to store the shifted data.</reg>
        <initial>
            <assign value="0"/>
        </initial>
        <always_event_control event="posedge clk">
            <non_blocking_assignment>
                <left_side>
                    <id_ref id="q"/>
                </left_side>
                <right_side>
                    <binary_operator operator=">>" left_side="(q)" right_side="1"/>
                </right_side>
            </non_blocking_assignment>
            <non_blocking_assignment>
                <left_side>
                    <id_ref id="q[7]"/>
                </left_side>
                <right_side>
                    <id_ref id="d"/>
                </right_side>
            </non_blocking_assignment>
        </always_event_control>
    </logic_description>
</module>
